headline: Is It Time To Reassess lululemon athletica (LULU) After A 62% One Year Share Price Fall
summary: This article looks at whether lululemon athletica stock may be starting to offer value after a difficult period, and explores what the current price might be implying about the company. The stock recently closed at US$126.47. Shareholders have seen declines of 0.7% over the past week, 5.3% over the past month, 40.0% year to date, and 62.2% over the last year. These moves have coincided with ongoing attention on lululemon athletica in the broader market, as investors reassess where the stock...

headline: Board, the new game startup from Mirror founder Brynn Putnam, raises $20M, has already sold thousands
summary: Board, the startup building what it calls "together tech" designed to bring people into the same room, has closed a Series A led by Union Square Ventures.
